product.name: AutoStream
product.description: AutoStream is a SaaS product that gives content creators automated video editing tools.

documents.title: AutoStream Pricing and Features
documents.content: Basic Plan: $29/month, 10 videos per month, 720p resolution. Pro Plan: $79/month, unlimited videos, 4K resolution, AI captions, and 24/7 support.

documents.title: AutoStream Refund Policy
documents.content: AutoStream does not offer refunds after 7 days.

documents.title: AutoStream Support Policy
documents.content: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan.

documents.title: AutoStream Product Overview
documents.content: AutoStream helps creators automate video editing workflows, generate AI captions, and export polished videos for social platforms.
